violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Employee observed eating while preparing food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Uncovered pan of food observed in the chest freezer. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (robot coupe) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Working containers of ingredients and sauces in squirt bottles are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Food observed stored on the floor in the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Plastic coated strainers were not in good repair, with sections of the plastic cracked or missing. One knife was in poor repair, with cracks in the handle. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The gasket on the chest freezer was not in good repair, with numerous cracks. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, prep units, and robot coupe, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The chest freezer has an accumulation of dirty frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

A wall in the kitchen is in poor repair, with the edge piece cracked, and the FRP pulling away from the wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2026

The metallic-coated insulation covering a large flue is in poor repair, with the metallic coating worn away, leaving dirty and melted bubble wrap exposed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on shelves in the storage area, and cell phone observed in food prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Uncovered container of churros observed in the chest freezer. A bowl of lettuce was observed directly on top of a pan of lettuce in the prep unit. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
Beans observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the food prep unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the side of flattop grill, table beneath flattop grill have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The lowboy in the old walk in cooler has an accumulation of water. Chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outdoor areas outside the dumpster enclosure, and alongside the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
Mold and debris observed on lights in the walk in cooler. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized, and bagged ice will be used until it is serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

Utensils observed stored on an unclean surface (crack between the wall and 3 bay sink) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the front service areas. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
The insulation on ducts outside the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
